name: python3-django-split-settings
title: python3-django-split-settings
summary: Organize Django settings into multiple files and directories (Python3 version)
description:
Organize Django settings into multiple files and directories (Python3 version)
Organize Django settings into multiple files and directories. Easily override
and modify settings. Use wildcards in settings file paths and mark settings
files as optional.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
